name: Spaghetti al Tonno e Pomodorini

ingredients.item: can San Marzano tomatoes plus one can of water
tuna in olive oil, that's about a jar or 1.5 5oz cans of tuna
pomodorini cut in half, leave the smaller ones whole.
sweet chili sauce (optional) or a whole chili if you like it spicy

method: In a frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil and 1 small chopped onion. Saute until transparent. Add tuna, and pomodorini (little tomatoes), and saute for a minute, then add tomatoes, water, salt, and pepper, and if you like spicy food, add a tablespoon of your favorite sweet chili sauce. We like Trader Joe's sweet chile sauce. You can also add another kind that you like or a hot chili pepper. Cover and let simmer on low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. When sauce is almost ready boil a pot of salted water and prepare pasta al dente. Add pasta to simmering sauce with 1 -2 ladles of pasta water and mix for 1-2 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the sauce is mixed into the pasta. Manticare 3-4 times, turn onto plates. Garnish with a little piece of parsley if you like. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3 Olé
